title: Legacy backlog batch 6 dispositioned
body: Closed claim d8206a4a after processing legacy backlog batch 6 in place. Dispositions: 2 graduated, 1 duplicate, 2 owner-gated, 1 stale-withdrawn. Permanent doc graduations: docs/governance/sonar-disposition-policy.md now names remediation-branch Sonar source of truth; docs/governance/development-practice.md now names session-local /doctor evidence as non-shell validation. Verification: targeted markdownlint pass, git diff --check pass, strict-hard SOFT with 20 soft, 22 healthy, 8 ready-empty, hard 0, critical 0. No archive, split, shard, rename, move, or new buffer file.
